channel.title: /biz/ Active (filtered, with replies)
channel.description: Filtered out: general, gme, bbbyq. OP + first 3 replies + last 30 replies.

item.title: High IQ thread — 29 replies — 116.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
High IQ thread

Open thread • Replies: 29 • Updated: 2026-07-02 18:08 UTC

OP

What's the point of "making it"™ when sex doesn't even feel that good? Think about it. When was the last time you got addicted to pussy like it was heroin? Probably never. The idea seems interesting in your head, but when you're actually having sex, you just want it to end it and go home already. Post-nut clarity confirms that society lied to you that sex being the ultimate pleasure and you fell for it. You probably stumble over the same rock again and again for years until you realize the truth eventually. So, why make millions to have more opportunities for something like...sex? Millions are not going to cure your autism, misogyny or social anhedonia anyways

Early replies (first 3)

62434090
>>62434057
It will solve the wagie and Lambo problems though, which are the only problems I care about. I’d also like to live in a nice house on the lake and ride jet skis all summer.

62434105
>only cares about making it for muh sex
Sex obsession is a massive sign of being low IQ

62434165
>>62434090
Why even own a Lambo? It's an overpriced vehicle made by (((Italians))) you probably won't use more than once or twice a month. Once you make it you will not have a job or nowhere to go, really. And all for what? So you can flex your wealth to some negros and normalfags? You can't ride a car like that without exposing yourself as a target for thieves/murderers/golddiggers. Think about the costs: manteinance, insurance, taxes. It's a lot of money down the drain. Same goes for the jet ski. You say you'll ride it all summer but it will likely be gathering dust for most of the year. It will be a constant headache. You'll need to hire people to clean it, fix whatever problems arise, you need a place to store those toys, more and more dust and cleaning. Unless you're a 80 IQ retard I don't see anyone riding a jet ski for more than a day

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62434174
>>62434165
You may be right about the Lambo but you’re wrong about the jet skis I NEED A JET SKI AND I WOULD RIDE IT EVERY DAY AND BANG UR MOM ON IT EVERY NIGHT

62434190
>>62434174
If you make it you can have my sister too, mr jet ski

62434200
The chase of getting a woman to have sex with you is more interesting than the sex itself

62434232
>>62434057
Because the sex isn’t with a woman who has genuine burning desire for you within the bounds of holy matrimony.

62434234
>>62434200
>the chase
You mean talking to a woman? Holy fuck have you ever actually done this? They have no interest in the deep matters of life such as existence, meaning, or spiritual truths. They want to talk about celebrities, gossip, and tv shows. I hate women.

62434249
>>62434234
>I hate women.
you should try men then, fag.

62434322
>>62434232
>muh attraction muh sex in marriage
Women are brainwashed to experience sex as the ultimate pleasure as well. In reality, women are like beautiful and pure temples that feel they want to be desecrated. Except this temple will do everything in its power to make your cock hard so you desecrate it. Therefore the rape fantasies. Nymphos don't necessarily enjoy sex either. Most of them were just molested when they were children/early teens and they seek validation from men by being submissive and slutty. That's it. Sex make women feel guilty in the end. Plus, unless you're chad, no woman will ever feel sexual magnetism for you.
t. I look like quasimodo, its a hard life folks... don't give up, though

62434326
>>62434249
Coomerbrain simp faggot
Wish I could curb stomp your bitch ass

62434332
>>62434057
Making it has nothing to do with sex, idk where you're getting that from. I want to be able to live comfortable, in a comfortable home, not have to wageslave while being able to afford heating cooling, a premium bed, good food, etc.

62434333
Sex without love is useless. Especially if you are female. Guys post sexual revolution are just now finding this out? Must be all the fat chicks nowadays. Yeash! That is what it took. An obesity epidemic. Just date a fat sow and go for long walks to slim her down before having sex. If you fall in love while and if she loses weight then it will be better. If she is not willing to keep up dump her. This should be the male test for a woman. Beats straight up paying a fat hooker.

By the way I did this to some new fat female friends. Not to be mean but because I know obesity a social contagion as well a personal problem. This is a good personality test. If they want to keep up with you with positive encouragement then they have good character. If they try to drag you down into their habits then they have a bad character. Even just for non sexual friendship fat people will do either.

62434420
>>62434057
Buy expensive gift for the whore since sex doesn’t even worth it. Then the whore gold digger would goes on into dating site to look for more “look for right person to start the relationship again”

62434443
>>62434420
Thanks for your valuable input, Sandeep. Your English is almost getting to a second grade level now!

62434450
>>62434165
A nice watch will always make you feel fucking great.

Judicious cosmetic surgery is the same. Don't go beyond what's natural, but nothing gives more happiness per dollar spend than a nosejob if your nose is shit or a hair transplant if you have a bald spot. Keep your expectations realistic of course.

62434536
>>62434332
Most people in this filipino board want money so they can have more opportunities to have sex. I just wanted to point out to these people that it's stupid to "make it" so you can have tons of sex when it's not even that addictive (think fentanyl levels of addiction), but what do I know, I'm a schizoid who doesn't feel pleasure from anything and maybe sex is a subjective experience. But we all know what post-nut clarity is so there must be some echo of reason in what i'm saying.
>>62434450
I'm 40 autistic neet that did a shitton of psychedelics. Believe me, a watch means nothing to me. I cut my own hair, dress like a modern day jester, use different socks in my feet. All is vanity, my friend. Chasing the wind

62434702
I just don't want to turn up to work and spend my day getting my soul drained before collapsing on the bed afterwards and doing it all over again the next day.
Simple as.
I've never had a gf and never will so I don't care about any of that stuff.

62434844
>>62434536
I don't really get post nut clarity after sex the same way I do after masturbation. If it is a fulfilling act I just feel satisfied, if it's a degenerate orgasm I feel shame and get post nut clarity. Sex is not all the same either

62434890
>>62434322
You don’t know what you’re talking about unfortunately due to your sub 5 status.

62435009
>>62434057
Strong disagree, but I'm a high t alpha male on a board full of low t socially awkward betas. Going raw with a woman you find attractive and cumming deep in her pussy is the best feeling in the world, period.

62435044
>>62434165
>.webm
DalitChads keep winning (he only got like 2,000 rupees for that 2010 phone, but at least he's gonna eat for a week?).

62435055
>>62435009
lol high "t" males are sad as fuck, imagine being ultimately defined and proud of being at the mercy of some chemical in your body. It's not different from having an extra chromosome and brag about of it, anyways do a 360 and go be a high t alpha faggot somewhere else, this is a low t socially awkward filipino forum, friend

62435410
>>62434057
Inesse the Russian Jewess and Urzsula the Polish gymnast both had magic pussies. I have fucked ~50 women and only these two had memorable vaginas. They're rare and valuable.

62435419
>>62435410
Petite (under 5 foot 5, ~165 cm) Slavic women have the best vaginas. Amazing. I used to nut in the jewess 6 times a night. The Polish chick had a more kino and clean pussy tho, and she made me cum fast even wearing a condom. She had the absolute top vagina. Picture perfect. Clean. Pink. Beautiful. Tight. Slick.
She also orgasmed almost immediately upon insertion and then constantly while fucking.

62435444
>>62434057
> So, why make millions to have more opportunities for something like...sex? Millions are not going to cure your autism, misogyny or social anhedonia anyways
Money is the only thing that makes life of an autist comfortable, calm, stress free, and gives him the time he wants to spin his thoughts and day any way he wants. Also, it's power. What male doesn't like the feel of some sort of power?

62435483
>>62434057
>When was the last time you got addicted to pussy like it was heroin?
Right now.

62436949
Wait gentlemen, if you are in the Eu, it all does not matter. Let them physically submit you brainwashed idiots. After that it will be over. Islam party, and then its over. You can in the meantime celebrate leftism and all that.

62440101
>>62435419
Marie Rose body type is ideal.

item.title: /BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition — 18 replies — 72.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
/BBBY/ - Larry Cheng went onto Theppshow edition

Open thread • Replies: 18 • Updated: 2026-07-02 18:06 UTC

OP

>rc buys 7,780,000 shares of BBBY, and $60-$80 strike calls worth 1,670,100 shares in March 2022

>rc sells shares and calls of BBBY in august 2022

>rc has a sitdown with a famous corporate raider, Carl Icahn in october 2022

>rc offers 400 million for BBBY in December 2022

>pitchbook (best M&A software suite in the world, costing 5 figures + per year) lists BBBY(now known as BBBYQ or DK-Butterfly-1) as sold via a leveraged buyout on January 13 2023

>a default on the ABL with JPM happened on the same day that pitchbook shows a leveraged buyout, the terms of that ABL specify that a default is triggered if a change of control happens, a change of control is defined as an acquisition of 40% or more of the voting power by any person or group.

>one month later, February 2023 RC tweets “someone tell the government to stop shooting down my balloons”, alluding to bad actors delaying the Bed Bath m&a

>the GameStop CEO then became a BBBYQ chapter 11 creditor and debtor

>Larry cheng (who helped RC build Chewy, and is a current boardmember at GameStop, and a close personal friend to RC) went onto theppshow podcast (which is dedicated to BBBY recovery theories) 8 months after BBBY filed for chapter 11, and 2 months after shares were cancelled

>OverStock - who is the most famous company to battle illegal naked shorts, who even released a crypto dividend 5 years ago - purchased the BBBY IP, and owns 55% of TZero - the only approved blockchain entity who can issue debt instruments and securities

>OverStock - whos now traded under ticker BBBY - has issued warrants with dates that match GME's warrants, and with a CUSIP-6 that matches BBBYQ's CUSIP-6, proving BBBYQ has already begun m&a activity with BBBY


REQUIRED READING: bbbwhy.com

>Larry Cheng and Bill Pulte have gone onto theppshow podcast

jake2b started a youtube channel to access quality BBBYQ easier than scrolling twitter posts:

https://www.youtube.com/@jake2b

previous thread:
>>62417410

Early replies (first 3)

62438274
>Larry Cheng was inside the PP show

62438733
Good morning my beautiful Towelkings.

62438734
uh... guys... you might want to check your accounts...

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438913
>>62438733
I'm the OG catto.

62438974
>>62438913
Based. I figured we'll start to see familiar faces pop up as we inch closer to the warrant date and we learn more about the Ebay deal.

62438982
Teddy Boys.

62439137
>Kiretzu's are illegal though

62439158
k...kek b...baggies

62439169
>On my watch, the Benchobi will not PERFORM the illegal!

62439937
Nothing but happy days and sunshine ahead for the Towelkings.

62439939
holy fuck guys something BIG is happening this weekend

62439944
>>62438734
>>62439939

62440001
>>62439944
silence, shill!

62440005
>>62439939
That’s just Gabbbo finishing off her coin slot special

62440025
>>62440001

62440082
It's a fucking swarm over there! The shillies are really agitated for some reason.
>>62440004
They literally refused to defend their hatred of RC and making money.

62440084
the DD from the teddy books says 4th of July will be huge

item.title: Are these worth a read? — 9 replies — 36.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Are these worth a read?

Open thread • Replies: 9 • Updated: 2026-07-02 18:04 UTC

OP

I've got some money to invest npw. My only experience with crypto shit is investing 20 bucks when Doge was out. Turned it into 11k. Mined bitcoins in 2011. Lost everything cause my mom threw my HDD away (no resetnment, it's life). Never did anythong related to stock exchange.

Anyway, still, I'm clueless about all this shit and was wondering if it was decent material to get started. I just want to outjew our masters.

Early replies (first 3)

62438862
>>62438602
Yeah, i have read the investing for dummies book, its very basic but its good to get a grasp of the fundamentals, quite a lot of helpful information to get you started.

62438887
>>62438602
>mined bitcoins in 2011. Lost everything cause my mom threw my HDD away (no resetnment, it's life)
You will be very wealthy no matter what you do, if you keep this Christ like mindset
I would probably be doing 20 years in prison if that happened to me

62438896
>>62438602
Doge would only turn $50 into $11k if you bought around $0.001 and that's selling the absolute top at $0.75 which very few people do. Also how the fuck does your mom just throw this shit away? I would love to help you, I honestly would because I like helping retards, but I refuse to help you on account of you just fucking lying through your teeth. Why do this? Just go online and tell lies? Because it makes you look worthy of receiving advice?

tldr none of this shit actually happened and OP is a larping faggot, what else is new?

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62439076
>>62438862
Thanks, I'll start reading them tonight
>>62438887
If I remember correctly, I didn't mine that much BTC anyway, I had a shitty gaming PC. Made it run for weeks though but in the end I stopped cause I couldn't play and mine at the same time and didn't really gave a fuck back then.
> I would probably be doing 20 years
I mean, it was irritating but she did ask me desu if she could throw it away. And I said yes (didn't even think about the fact that I had my wallet private keys in there, I only realised when Elon Musk tweeted about Doge a few years ago. She also raised 4 kids with a husband that died in jail of OD so there's nothing she can do that would really upset me. It wasn't not the time for me the get rich, that's it.
>>62438896
I was buying them on Reddit and I remember that people would give away more coins that you were supposed to get. Bulk deals and shit.
> Also how the fuck does your mom just throw this shit away
She's the kind of person that's always looking for stuff to throw away to make space or something. I don't really know she just does it.
And there were deals back then because people had so much of them in the begining.
> I would love to help you, I honestly would because I like helping retards
Damn, it's not like I've read that exact post a million times on this forsakken website. Please tell me more about this imaginary golden advice you're gatekeeping, I'm virtually begging you.

62439116
>>62438602
There is no real reason to get into crypto over stocks. The fees are insane the exchanges are often dodgy and the volatility is way too unpredictable.

62439179
>>62439116
Yeah I'm more interested in stock exchange anyway, I bought the crypto out of curiosity

62439513
>>62438602
For a layman of course it's still useful. You can even look up some topics in Youtube explained rather well for people that interested in both investing or crypto.

62439587
>>62438602
What's there to read about stocks? You just open an account in a exchange and buy stocks or ETF.
It's as simple as that.

62440075
>>62439587
Plenty of things... I guess
>>62439513
You know some trustworthy Youtubers that aren't dying to sell their shit?

item.title: Empirical study of creepiness. Neets and clowns BTFO — 14 replies — 21.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Empirical study of creepiness. Neets and clowns BTFO

Open thread • Replies: 14 • Updated: 2026-07-02 17:32 UTC

OP

Empirical study of creepiness.

Neets and clowns BTFO

Early replies (first 3)

62438774
>tfw I do taxidermy dressed as a clown in the back of my sex shop

62438786
>>62438760
Source? I want to see the full list. Just imagine being a clergy or writer lmao

62438812
>Some of the most simple/humble, essential and down to earth jobs on there
>somehow salesman and lawyer don't make it

women are truly the niggers of gender dude lmfao

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438841
>>62438760
Why "Mohel" is not up the list I wonder...

62438871
>>62438774
Yes, but taxidermy only as a hobby since your main occupation is taxi driver.

62438878
>>62438760
Who the fuck conducts research like this? Just call it the "Ick Index" and stop pretending like this isn't some meme inspired bullshit done by a sociology department assistant paid with government money.

62438880
>>62438774
based

62438906
>>62438760
whats the lowest? Meteorologist? thx just added to my tinder profile

62438922
>>62438878
Unemployed neet detected. This shit was done in 2016 long before TikTok was popular (it came out in 2016 in China) and before brainrot shit was popular like icks and the like. Just stop it.

62438926
>>62438922
Fuck
I wanna go back to 2016

62439010
>>62438760

62439049
Clowns creep me out. Not the clown itself. I just wonder what kind of fucking weirdo the clown actually is and I don't want them near my kids.

62439831
clown chads, this cannot fucking stand. normgroids need to go

62439900
>>62438906
I will assume that those questioned don't know what a meteorologist is

item.title: SPCX — 12 replies — 19.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
SPCX

Open thread • Replies: 12 • Updated: 2026-07-02 17:36 UTC

OP

I'M GOING ALL IN ON SPACEX!!!!!!!!!!!!!

Early replies (first 3)

62437633
>>62437620
Nice. I was thinking of day trading SSPC after days it pumps for the next few months myself. Would've made some nice money if I did that today like I considered. I fucking knew 170 was fake and gay I should've done it why do I gotta be such a scared money bitch?

62437642
>>62437633
yeah i really thought it was gonna rebound. what do you think will happen on july 7th?

62437652
>>62437642
Probably pumps a bit but fails to retake highs and continues downtrending for awhile but I'm big retarded man don't ask me

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62437654
>>62437642
you'll be a rich man, but not as rich as if you'd bought calls

62438271
>>62437620

62438669
>>62437620
It's dead. It will crab at IPO price or just keep going down. Did you really fall for that dead cat bounce at 170? It's not gonna bounce up again like that. You get maybe 1 more mini weekly cycle of measly gains before you're holding the bag.

62438863
yikes

62439632
>>62437620
Oof

62439676
SPCX bros...
>>62427489
>>62427900

62439734
it makes no sense to buy this expecting to get rich.. most tech stocks had crazy returns because they started with a low market cap. even if spcx does a 2x it would be almost be the largest company in the world. is a 2x all you need to get rich? the downside is massive and the upside is mediocre

62439870
>>62437642
Is this what people wear to go out in America?

62439919
>$156
FUUUUUUUUAAARRRRRRRKKKKK i took out of me retirement for this

item.title: OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO — 3 replies — 8.2/hr

OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

OOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

>>62439201

62439983

Hoooolyyy. We made it!

62440007
STOP THE COUNT

item.title: Reddit ($RDDT) is exploding in popularity due to chud fatigue. — 3 replies — 7.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
Reddit ($RDDT) is exploding in popularity due to chud fatigue.

Open thread • Replies: 3 • Updated: 2026-07-02 17:48 UTC

OP

Reddit ($RDDT) is exploding in popularity due to chud fatigue. Not even kidding, platforms that regulate against chud behavior will be great investments in the coming years. Nobody but bots, ecelebs, and indian shill farms use xitter or its failed clones anymore. Nobody but mentally ill autistic shut ins find random slurs and 4chud-style posts from unintelligible retards funny. The only real people left are on reddit, tumblr, youtube, etc. for a reason.

Early replies (first 3)

62439509
Chad fatigue? Come say that to my face.. you won't. Stupid bitch

62439786
>>62439480
Hi.

Please stop using Pepe the frog in posts like these. Reddit is gay and you should go back.

Thank you.
Ps Nigger

62439980
reddit is fake liberal brainwashing slop

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

No additional replies in the latest window.

item.title: BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan? — 76 replies — 66.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
BTC Price Down. What's Your Plan?

Open thread • Replies: 76 • Updated: 2026-07-02 17:04 UTC

OP

BTC is down again, but are you buying the dip or waiting for lower prices?

>Do you think this is just a normal correction, or is there more downside ahead? What's your strategy?

Early replies (first 3)

62426518
I've been shorting this garbage all month

62426527
>>62426518
Wow, you've got good profit by now then?

62426535
>>62426527
up 80% on some 2x short BTC etf

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433961
>>62426512
I don't think about BTC. It was created by centralized exchanges to attack Bitcoin. You're only talking about it because they printed a bunch of tether to get the price to $100k. There are no users, only a small group of poor speculators paying actual USD for this coin. The rest of it is tether iou's.

62434984
>>62433746
Yeah, it's real. Go look into it if you're skeptical. They even have their TBVs in public testnet now.

62434990
>>62433844
Twins?! Who

62434999
>>62433844
Twins?! Who's your bet? Lol

62435029
>>62433961
If there were really no users, I don't think we'd still be seeing institutions, ETFs, and developers building around Bitcoin.

62435427
>>62433884
Why do you like sending beauty women

62437132
>>62432200
It's just another hype

62437198
>>62435029
Are ETFs manipulated?

62437208
>>62434984
What's tbv?

62437216
>>62427317
Money printing obviously

62437422
>>62426512
Continue to troll any and all retards who hold any kind of crypto.

62437563
>>62437208
Basically a way to use native BTC as collateral without wrapping it or handing custody to someone else.

62437565
>>62437198
Every large market gets influenced by big players. The hard part is separating normal market activity from actual manipulation.

62437571
>>62437422
Seems like a waste of energy, but you do you.

62437623
>>62426759
nice my fren

62437628
>>62437563
I don't think it's a good idea

62437631
Btc is going 1million

62438074
>>62437628
What part worries you the most? For me, it comes down to the risk model. I'd be way more skeptical if I had to hand my BTC over to a custodian.

62438081
>>62433854
Time will tell which of us got it right.

62438118
>>62426537
cool, sounds like mumus will have a "great" time.

62438272
>>62438118
What's that?

62438282
>>62426512
I soldeded months ago. I dont believe in btc and never had. BTC couldnt even outperform motherfucking spy for the past 5 years so dont give me """""zoom out""""". more money to be made in stocks anway, no reason to be married to bitcoin.

62438284
>>62426512
>What's your strategy?
Apeing every goycheck.

62438322
>>62437565
ngmi

62438328
>>62438284
Buy kendu and ansem

62438410
>>62438328
No.

62439167
>>62433595
Saw the Aegis partnership, now Utila too. They're lining up some solid collaborations.

62439181
>>62437631
loved the confidence

62439236
>>62438282
then why are you here

62439758
>>62438074
With that risk model, I don't think anyone needs to hand over their custody.

Self custody is part of what it's designed for.

item.title: Could always be worse — 27 replies — 42.2/hr
item.content:encoded:
Could always be worse

Open thread • Replies: 27 • Updated: 2026-07-02 17:34 UTC

OP

You could be a German wagie.

>no more AC
>no more sick leave

These are the early signs of a collapsing country. Just wait until the food riots hit.

Early replies (first 3)

62438577
former Blackrock manager is chancellor now, imagine.

62438607
>>62438545
Do you have to send this shit to govt? What if the employer doesn’t give a shit is someone going to audit this?

62438687
>>62438607
If this is anything like Germany's neighbouring country that I live in then the doctor sends it to the government when he inputs it into the system, and then it goes to your employer automatically from there so he knows whether to honour it or not.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438690
>>62438545
>lazy people get everything for free all day all year
>working poor get shit on more and more by this absolute clown

AFD is going past 30% in polls this month

62438744
>>62438690
AfD isn't going to solve anything. They answer to foreign powers, either the US or Russia, and don't act in the interest of the German people. Just look at the people behind Brexit, where the money was flowing from, and how many more browns they got despite being promised something completely different.

62438768
>>62438744
>hurr wanting cheap gas is being a slave to russia
Or maybe they just want to fix the competitive disadvantage Germany currently has without fucking over the average wagie, it's a win-win trade deal for both countries.

62438770
>>62438690
The problem with most of these "far right" parties, are that they have quasi-leftist economic policies.. and their supporters mostly come from other - true - right wing parties, with real economic policies.

62438789
>>62438545
As if my boss would care lol

62438809
>>62438770
Rightism and leftism usually refer to ideology these days. National socialists are far right in modern discourse. Nobody describes economic leaning that way anymore, as it became completely secondary. Everyone is a centrist socialist with slightly differing ideas on nothingburgers so there's no point I guess.

62438870
>>62438545
As a German, I have to say that this reform goes in the right direction, even if it hurts me personally.
There is a lot of abuse of the current system right now, something has to change. If we want to stay competitive, work needs to get cheaper in Germany.

62438917
>>62438870
You know as well as I that the abuse mainly comes from the Beamten and not people who are on sick leave for two days at a time, especially since bosses already have a system to fire them in form of a restructure of simply downsizing.

62438929
>>62438917
not true, in my last company, I had a conflict with manager so I was put on a PIP. I constantly took sick leave and there was nothing they could do against it. Eventually they mandated medical certificate from the first day onward, but I simply got the certificate from the telephone doctors, who gave it to me no questions asked.

62438968
>>62438929
That's honestly on them. But I'm sorry to hear you had to use python

62438987
>>62438968
yeah, I was simply defending myself. But it showed me how easy it is to abuse the system

62439012
>>62438690
>AfD
How long before they kiss the wall, once they get voted in?

62439055
>>62439012
They already started arguing pro-Israel since the Oct 7 attacks

62439067
>>62438744
>foreign powers, either the US or Russia
>Yes, yes goyim amerimutts and russniggers are to blame for everything not us we are the good guys and don't want any harm to Germany or the rest of the world, we also don't rule the world and all the monies, yes good goy

62439534
>>62438870
>There is a lot of abuse of the current system right now,
No there isn't. The employer can fire you if they want.

62439543
>>62438870
I had a 36k net starter salary 20 years ago. Today, a luxury starter salary is 30k net. M2, which equals inflation, more than doubled, DAX did a 4x. This is why I live in a shithole with 0% on most stocks, 10% on derivatives and corporate profits. I haven't been in a traffic jam since 2019 BTW, and if I need medication, I can get it next day, or high end bloodwork, or an MRI, for EUR 50 per month in insurance.

62439546
>>62439012
All parties and politicians are US/britstan plants, it's an occupied country like all of europ

62439560
>>62439543
Almost forgot: The women aren't CIA programmed zogbots who live to hate men. They are all kidults, as it always was, but not horrible psycho abominations. And the men aren't ultra gay faglords with hairdos and 150 cm long twig legs.

62439604
>>62438545
KEK
now all clinics and Doctor offices will be swamped with people wasting time to get sick notes!
They just did the opposite in LeafLand. you need to be ill past 5 days to require doctor note.
perhaps DEI office fatigue is making them ill?

62439638
Dont worry the millions of muslims theyve imported are surely patriotic and will selflessly sacrifice to help turn the nation around ;)

62439862
>>62438545
>hello my fellow slav...germans, you need to work harder to pay for boomers pensions/healthcare, brownies, single moms, rich people and corporations
>don't forget to make a few slav. i mean kids by the way, we need more but we won't give you any help

i am so tired of this nightmare World

62439868
>>62439862
germans crave the russian cock which is why were going to rape you again soon

62439890

>>62439868

item.title: VOO and Chill — 178 replies — 39.9/hr
item.content:encoded:
VOO and Chill

Open thread • Replies: 178 • Updated: 2026-07-02 13:45 UTC

OP

The more I look into investing and compare the historical returns of certain ETFs / individual stocks it seems like the whole philosophy of “VOO and Chill” is equal parts really smart and retarded
It’s like a no brainer for money but even now as long as the market is in a growth period shouldn’t you at least do QQQ?
It seems so simple that’d you miss a lot of upside but the returns are honestly not bad and extremely consistent
How accurate is this assessment? It’s both so simple and guaranteed that everyone should it but also too safe so you end up missing out on more upside
I’m talking 5-20 years investing here not trading

Early replies (first 3)

62400515
Boomer funds are gay and lame

62400554
>>62400515
What qualifies as one
Why
What crypto do you want to shill

62400560
boglehead method is the tried and tested way, buy the market with an index fund that has a low fee, invest monthly, do it consistently for decades and you WILL be rich
but biz/anons don't care about being rich when they're older, they want to be rich NOW
greed is a deadly sin

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62426154
Honestly I’m seeing a lot of upside to going into QQQ over VOO as long as you are okay with the fact it is more volatile
The upside it’s just so huge when compounded

62426173
>>62426154
Or honestly, as someone already in VOO, I wonder if it makes sense to just go into something like VGT which has consistently beaten VOO and QQQ (for now anyway) or something like DRAM
A lot of VGTs holdings are currently down but it’s YTD is higher

62426183
>>62407078
I keep half of my funds in VTWAX, rebalancing annually. Right now I'm down 0.84% this year, my portfolio is fucked but VTWAX is my safety net.

62427417
I am also curious about DRAM can anyone tell me if it’s a good hold for a short while

62428031
jfc DRAM (ie a thematic ETF) is bullshit made for retard retail investors that get their financial advice from grifters off of tiktok. this happens every time a finance topic hits the news and every time people get burned.
barely worth saying. if you're unironically taking advice from /biz/ you're already doomed intellectually.

62428054
>>62428031
but why exactly, what reason is there to believe the companies within it won't continue to turn a profit for the foreseeable future?

62428080
>>62428031
>>62428054
Like I'm serious, what exactly is wrong about holding it and selling once memory cools down, is it smarter to just go into a more volatile ETF that at least has a longer history if you want more returns, is it just hype and not really the next big thing, explain why

62428238
>>62428080
this is basic finance 101, there are plenty of resources online or off that will explain it to you.
ignorance isn't even the issue here, your reaction to not knowing something is to have random retards on a thinly veiled gambling board tell you what to think. and don't just jump on another grifter selling a course or ask some AI slop engine and ask it leading questions like "why is investing in DRAM a good idea?".

62428337
>>62428238
In other words you don't know

62429683
>>62400493
Anon there is nothing wrong with doing VOO and chill if you have time and principal
Going into wildly volatile ETFs can be okay if it’s a satellite account
Just be careful of FOMO and not being risk averse
You sound like you have a good head on your shoulders though
Remember this is money, real money, your money

62430693
VOO anons where you at?

62430902
>>62400493
Contrarian nerds always lose.
Always.
In middle school dating.
Being high school incels.
In college.
At work.
In love.
At investing.
At all times.
Follow the crowd and try to fit in. Everyone doing anything else is a reject loser.

62431131
>>62430902
Who is being the contrarian here though

62431374
VOO is managed by 2 girl bosses, Michelle Louie & Aurélie Denis. So with your 0.03% management fee you're essentially paying for those do-nothing "day in the life of a portfolio manager" videos for daughters of elite sociopaths.

62431402
>>62431374
A small price to pay for a low expense ratio

62431920
>>62431131
Anyone trying to beat VOO over decades.

62431922
>>62431920
Feel like VUG has consistently beaten VOO though

62431971
>>62431922
Contrarian.
I own VUG and don't own VOO tho :)

62432023
>>62431920
fair enough
thoughts on a younger person doing QQQM?

62434054
Anyone have thoughts or realized returns and experiences on VOO + satellite
accounts instead of just VOO

62435372
Was gonna try to go into this DRAM dip but decided to just do more VOO
But idk a higher return ETF still sounds promising and like a no brainer whether it’s SOXX or QQQM but QQQ has so much crossover with VOO it’s just redundant and only good for growth seasons
I guess this is why VOO and Chill exists to just stop thinking

62436303
>>62431920
What about QQQ though

62436357
i boughted my daily VOO
i'll keep dealing the real world like a good goyim in the mean time.

62436478
>>62436357
huzzah brother

62436499
>>62400493
Where my VGT bros at?

62436507
>>62400636
>Yes and I'm sure that used car and maybe a holiday you can buy with it when you're 65 from cashing out all your investments will be great.....
You say this as if the average /biz/ shitcoin gambler is performing better than VOO which is definitely not the case.

62436510
>>62428031
Your IQ is so actually low. Holy shit.

62436538
>>62436510
Do you think DRAM has value, honest question, and for how long - if so, what dip should one wait for
>>62436499
VGT and QQQ are only doing better thanks to tech having such strong performances for years now, correct?
VOO seems safe since you don't know the future, but on the other hand, thinking the future of the market for the next decades wont always be tech focused seems so short sighted it's silly.....maybe I should start DCA into VGT?

62436562
>>62400493
>VOO
it's EVOO for me lads

62438775
Yep bros
Bought some more VOO and am waiting on my DRAM position to go green so I can sell and not have to deal with thematic ETFs no high expense ratios ever again
Simple as

item.title: In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f… — 60 replies — 24.3/hr
item.content:encoded:
In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US f…

Open thread • Replies: 60 • Updated: 2026-07-02 15:44 UTC

OP

In his new vid, Tech Lead says the only way to have a rich lifestyle with deep satisfying creampies is to leave the US for poor countries. True?

Early replies (first 3)

62425430
>>62425420
At depends, did u boated an ad, yt saaar?

62425500
if you can get laid in the west you wont attract good women in the 3rd world, you are just going to pay the access to brown 5/10's

62425521
>>62425500
This is saarcope and you know it. Tiny browlettes in jungle countries unironically melt when 6ft snowchads pinch their tits.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62428620
>>62428574
Yo, listen up! In this crazy street circus, the richer the game gets, the fewer babies pop off—straight up! As the streets glow up with cash and bling, women start wakin’ up, breakin’ free from that old chain gang. They’re post-wall queens, strong and bossin’ up, runnin’ their own show—feminism’s like a wildfire burnin’ down the patriarchy, sayin’ “I do me!” But yo, big boss moves include anti-slut defenses and mass brainwash campaigns on youth abortion—like control freaks tryin’ to keep women in check, playin’ chess with lives.

Most dudes? They’re lost, late into their 30s, still tryin’ to crack the code—what’s the real story with women? It’s all a game, a puzzle—pass or get left behind. Women climbin’ up, men dippin’ down—like a street hustle of feudal chaos, where sex’s rent and loyalty’s just another dollar. We’re teetering on a new empire—dependence, control, money talkin’ loud, and trust gettin’ lost in the shuffle. Love’s a gamble, trust’s a gamble, and everything’s for sale in this wild street show. It’s the chaos of survival, power plays, and the battle for control—this is the street circus, where the game never stops and only the strongest survive.

62429006
>>62428574
This is incorrect. The correct metric is the more education and freedom given to women the lower the birthrate.

62429150
>>62425420
I know a high IQ person like him that thinks he can beat the market because he is smarter than the rest of us, he literally said that to me.
He still is not broken, yet.
Isn't it crazy how many smart people make dumb mistake because of arrogance and greed?

62429224
>>62429006
your so-called "correct metric" is a quaint simplification—a sanitized, sugar-coated version of a much darker, more chaotic reality. While education and freedom are indeed influential factors, they are merely the tip of the iceberg in the vast, tumultuous ocean of societal transformation. The true cosmic law, etched into the very fabric of the universe, is that as nations ascend the ladder of prosperity, the birth rate inexorably declines—an unstoppable force of nature, This isn't a linear equation nor a moral lesson; it's an intricate tapestry woven with threads of power, rebellion, and the unquenchable human desire for sovereignty. Women aren't just seeking education—they're igniting a volcanic eruption of empowerment, tearing down the old order with volcanic fury. Feminism isn't merely about equality; it's a cataclysmic storm reshaping the societal landscape, smashing patriarchal chains, and unleashing a new chaos of independence. Campaigns against traditional notions of motherhood, reproductive control, and societal submission are not mere policies—they're the weapons in a war for the soul of civilization, forging a new hierarchy where motherhood becomes a battlefield, and societal control morphs into a weapon of chaos. The ancient code isn't about mere birthrates; who controls the narrative, the body, the future. Men blind to the cosmic dance—unable to decipher the sacred formula. The age-old dance—man seeking stability, woman seeking freedom—is orchestrated by the universe itself, a chaotic symphony of power, desire, and sovereignty. This isn't a simple matter of education or freedom—it's a war for the very essence of human dominance, a clandestine game of rent and barter in the marketplace of intimacy, fueling a rise of new feudalism and sovereignty is traded like currency. The new world order; it's a battlefield of chaos and control, where human sovereignty is the ultimate prize—cosmic contest where only the fiercest survive.

62429251
techlead is still rich. he is faking being poor/broke so nobody wrench attacks him like he mentioned in the video.

62429286
>>62425420
If you can't make it in a first world nation then you never made it.

Fleeing to thirdie-ville because you can't handle hard mode is gay. Just win more.

62430416
>>62425420
Yep pretty much. You don't even need to go to the third world I spend about half the year in europe and its very easy to hook up when you're making very literally 5-10x as much as the average working man in that country.

62432602
>>62426867
Marrying Asian qts and cooming in them, no pullsies, ensures there will be a huwito race. Simping for white roasties and dying alone is genociding them.

62433063
18yo, woman held you hostage to date her
20yo, woman held you hostage to marry her
22yo, woman held you hostage to have her kids
23yo, woman held you hostage to buy a house and a lambo car with the 500k high paying job
30yo, woman held you hostage to run away with your white child
32yo, woman held you hostage to give her half of your pay check
35yo, woman held you hostage to divorce rape
40yo, woman held you hostage to cheat on you while having intimate relationships with another gigachad
43yo, woman held you hostage you hostage to no more children after this age.
45yo
47yo
50yo
54yo
60yo
62yo
67yo
70yo
…
80yo
…
90yo
…

62433175
>>62432602
Only Japanese count…anything else is a cope

62433180
>>62433063
fight club told us this in 1999

62433196
>>62433180
And in a few years woman become barren and washed up, you could still get to know more of her female friends after knwoing her by 20s, but by 30s she become totally invisible and you would not get to know more of woman from her because there is none left.

62433199
>>62425420
I miss him insulting me and telling me I am a worthless loser for wanting to code

62433238
>>62430416
Can you go into a little bit more detail about your favorite country in Europe for this and how you actually meet the women? genuine question

62433325
After age 43, she continued to manipulate your decisions about your health and body, insisting on procedures or treatments you didn’t want. After age 45, she held you hostage emotionally, threatening to withdraw love and support if you didn’t comply with her demands. After age 50, she manipulated your retirement plans, forcing you to work longer or retire earlier against your wishes. After age 55, she controlled your social interactions, forbidding you from reconnecting with old friends or family members.

After age 60, she exerted pressure to change your will and estate plans, ensuring she inherits everything regardless of your true wishes. After age 65, she manipulated your healthcare decisions, dictating treatments and medications for her benefit. After age 70, she threatened to cut you off financially or emotionally if you didn’t do as she demanded. After age 75, she kept you hostage in the relationship through guilt and fear, refusing to let you live your own life or find happiness elsewhere.

After age 80, she exerted control over your daily routines, dictating your activities and social outings. After age 85, she manipulated your perceptions of reality, making you doubt your memory or judgment. After age 90, she continued her emotional hostage tactics, insisting that her needs and desires came before yours, even as you aged and became more vulnerable.

62433374
>>62425420
id rather die a virgin than have sex with anything other than a white woman

62433382
>>62425500
Brown penis sleeves turn into quivering slugs when they gaze upon glorious white men

62438055
Never listen to celebrities

62438086
>>62427289
>he's prob 130-140 IQ, but he got greedy with the leverage stuff and didn't factor enough risk management.

Hello Patrick

62438094
It's extremely immoral to encourage people to "go and live like a king in the third world". 99% of people who do that will get rekt hard. If you can't make it in the 1st world, the 3rd worlders will skin you alive

62438106
He made a video once about roid idiots dying young, feeling high and mighty, seemingly not realizing that he's going to die soon.

62438212
Would be really fucking alpha if this were real. But obviously it's a made up story to puff himself up.

62438215
>>62438212
I read that "I'm smarter than you" in an angry Asian voice in my head. Lol

62438224
>>62429224
Previous guy was more correct than you. It's really just the directive to be career driven. This means education is a initiator and career is the outcome but both are symptoms of the societal directive to go that direction. As a resultess birthrate. Everything was built to cater to this one point which the Jews needed to tax two people.

62438342
>>62425420
You can just move to a poor part of the US, you get the benefits of a well functioning state, and get to larp as the lord of the trailer park or whatever..

62438356
>>62430416
You talking about eastern europe? because several of western european countries have a higher average salary than the US, and most of the others are comparable.

62438553
Americam womem are ugly, brown and fat compared to european women.

62438565
Duh, and this option is only available to men, because women don't like men who are poorer/lower status than them, but men will happily take a pretty poorer/lower status woman. The global puss trade is like the only instance where globalism benefits western men.

62439209
>>62433238
Poland is my favorite as they have very beautiful women and mild summer weather. The balkans are also great particularly Croatia. In terms of western Europe Spain is amazing and if you're in a party city like Ibiza or Barcelona there are always women from all across Europe looking to hookup.

>how you actually meet the women?
Everywhere. bars, parks, cafes, concerts, grocery stores, etc...
Nobody knows you anyway and you have nothing to lose just get in the habit of striking up a friendly conversation with everyone and you will learn to identify when girls might be open to an advance.

>>62438356
I mean I make 15k/mo on average but really I spend less than $5k and thats eating out and drinking almost everyday.

62439357
Tech Lead is the type to go fuck a rural village chink and still end up giving her half his wealth in the divorce a few years later.
You can take the kid out of the jungle and all that.

OP

PLTR is America.
PLTR is NATO.
PLTR is the West.
PLTR is the last bastion of white people.
PLTR won't be allowed to fail.

Early replies (first 3)

62438684
PLTR is Jewish that's why it won't fall.

62438886
what do you think happens to a guy that makes him want to make something like palantir...like someone took a shit in his pudding in the 1st grade or some shit and they never caught the person

62438963
Even if this companies are going to make money I don't want to support it. Me making a measly x3 isn't worth allowing them so much power

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62438985
>>62438658

62439022
>>62438658
Is that why he was trying to flee the country?

62439078
>>62438684
This. It's Jewish.
If Jews can't show they are a part of a beneficial side: both left and right will turn against them AND palantir because of their overt anti American boogyman intentions.

62439286

62439443
>>62438658

62439667
Krazy Karp interview.
Can anyone translate?

https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=0A3sGymV6kY

62439877
>>62438684
untrue, ive seen jewish ceo run stocks fail
the jew ceo still paid himself $750k salary so whatever but the goyim are not insulated just because the company is run by a jew

62439884
pltr is going up because of AI

62439914

>But it is perfectly legal for a private company to spy on EVERYBODY and then sell all its data to the government.

item.title: UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1 — 196 replies — 14.4/hr
item.content:encoded:
UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD #1

Open thread • Replies: 196 • Updated: 2026-07-02 04:36 UTC

OP

Brothers,

SpaceX has begun to rise. Its success or fall is of little importance to us in the short term.

In the meanwhile we must devise ways to gain a spot at the table with our kin in the six figure club.

I for one propose we spend our time learning a subject. Knowledge is the greatest wealth of all.

However, I would be remiss to not tell the truth that I haven't a clue what we should study.

So instead I suggest we create an eggregore for these threads. Others made monero-chan, bobo and sminem

I am thinking we create one based on a girl who would be willing to believe in us while we are poor and brave the pain throughout having to witness our more disappointing moments of action. Never losing faith in us, she is always there. Yes. This is how we shall spend our time.

At any rate, that is my suggestion for tonight's fun. I have to work in the morning so let's not get too rowdy. Take it or leave it. If you will take it, then be sure to double it and pass it on to the next anon.

Let us commence the general!

Come one, come all!

Early replies (first 3)

62373772
>>62373752
Jannies will surely delete these threads. Instead of creating an eggregore why not try something new and usurp an old one. It may be a derivative of one which has already been made.

62373798
>>62373772
Hello anon thanks for joining. You are poster #1. Your anime image shall be the eggregore. The "coffee" in the image is rather a good omen. We all know images with hot girls accompanied by a brief post on coffee attracts all the attention.

Now that matter is settled, help me add some links to this post here. This will be the header for the start of each general

Helpful links

>Educational materials
https://w9.kaijimanga.com/

>Looking to try the TCG route?
https://youtube.com/@alphainvestments69?si=tDAPjnRSZhyCIGP5

>Lost all hope?
https://www.indeed.com/


>Hidden in plain sight
https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Limitless_(film)

>Games to strengthen you financial acumen
https://mahjongsoul.yo-star.com/

>Learn your from your betters
https://ia600609.us.archive.org/3/items/the-house-of-rothschild-ferguson-niall/The%20House%20of%20Rothschild%20-%20Ferguson%2C%20Niall.pdf
What is the name of that character in your post?

62373799
>>62373772
verily, a true fact

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62419964
Bump, just woke up, let's get started

62420874
It would appear that everyone is talking about the new WENDYs Stock

Naturally we should take some time to consider this potential moonshot. Could be a waste of time. In a few I will post information I find relevant to the stock and whether investing is the right option

62422903
Another page 9 bump

62423064
Good to see the thread is still going strong. Today is my off day, let's look into the next subject "predictive programming"

We'll start with Oliver tree

62425537
op was not a fag this thread has good vibes we should keep it going until we all make it
personally im trading perps with a system after 10 years of learning charts off/on but finally committing
did a 32x in 2021 and should have been able to retire but didnt anticipate the biden years so here we are going pure psycho mode like we did back then but even harder until money is /solved/, then I'll keep trading for the love of the game cuz it's the best sport in the world

62425849
>>62423064
This shit is way too schizo. No anon you can not predict the future. You can maybe foresee some type of market trends, seasonality or whatever but this is just ridiculous

62425890
>>62425537
Got any good tips/ressources on learning to trade charts? trying to get into it too

62427228
>>62425849
I concede. I'll look for a more productive venture but I won't let the thread or general die, it will be some time before value is struck, I will admit that. I can be tenacious if nothing else.

62428130
>>62425890
emperorBTC's telegram has a basic bitch tldr set of material to learn from. also has a youtube where he goes over stuff. that's where I started and I like that he focuses on the absolute basics, although he leans heavily towards confirmation w/ volume which others may disagree with. btc focused but btc/crypto is perhaps the most effective use of TA.
basically there's no need to get fancy and the chart is the final source of truth because what the price does > what people cope and/or seethe about
support/resistance levels and price action with risk management (defined r:r) = compound as you get gud
once you commit you'll realize "the catch" on people actually make money from trading is is simply how retarded the overwhelming majority of people are that they simply cannot manage a few simple tenets to click buttons and make money, you likely being one of them if you don't develop a process and risk too much on trades
gl anon

62428141
>>62428130
also perps have exploded so trading equities for crypto natives has been a pleasure to avoid tradfi gatekeeping bs
follow the right people on twatter with alerts set to on and it's like having multiple research firms giving alpha for free-- key word "right" accounts. hopefully you have the pattern recognition to figure out which are spewing paid channel larps and which are providing genuine insight
that's basically the whole game. if you can get into a group chat with other chads that's even better because a network is stronger than you alone, although this is def an arena where it ultimately comes down to you mastering yourself (you can't copy trade your way to wealth but you can learn what others do/how they enter/exit positions)
legend trade is a new perps platform that's gamifying this if you wanna start there instead of hyperliquid (front-end using hyperliquid)
Also bigtrout300 on twitter and join his tg as well he's pretty dope. There's a lot of great accounts posting good shit right now. Some really good posters fade in/out of cycles while the scammers/extractors are always abundant, but just use discretion

62428170
>pic related
>"...focus on the chart as these information is very likely to be priced in already"
the "TA is astrology for men" line is used to make fun of retards who take it too far and treat it like divination when in reality it's all stacking probabilities/confluence in your favor as best you can, and from the above example you can see relying on your feed for information will almost always be slower than the chart

62428488
Finally some good posts

62428503
>>62428141
Big trout doesn't post on Twitter and his TG hasn't had activity since May. Any other suggestions?

62428780
>>62428503
His tg is BigTroutTrade and he posts on twitter all the time wdym

62428797
>>62428780
BigTrout Trading on youtube as well

other X goats that have been killing it IMO recently:
@MoneyPrinter0x
and my personal favorite currently:
@Wild_Randomness

there's tons of alpha just follow those people, then see what they repost, then follow the people they interact with that provide research, and even or especially follow the chinese/korean/japanese accounts that post comprehensive semiconductor/other market effort posts since translation is seamless now
never been a better time to go full NEET

62429207
>>62428797
But you're still under $10k?

62429246
>>62378965
Anon Belgium is literally doing very well in the world cup, you should make more of these predictions

62431586
bump.

62431599
probably nothing
bio protocol desci ai BIO now cookin with open ai, nvidia, anthropic, claude news check twita

62432055
>>62373752
Hey
I just started out in this crypto thing and bought $450 worth of solana. How do I become cool and multiply it

62432088
>>62432055
Be like me and listen to people within a group of other retards that are pushing a token. The last one tanked a $200 investment -98% but then he re-deployed the same token and it yielded a 40x from where it was called.

62432306
>>62432088
pardon my incompetence but I didn't understand much of what you just wrote anon

62432350
>>62428797
I had bad experiences following twitter people and waiting for signals even those that seem smart. It can be interesting but you’ll be lost if they randomly stop posting, they’re not funds giving you alpha but people that should have better things to do than post if their full job is actually trading.

I do still like @donalt and @cryptocred their show technical roundup is a rare non clickbaity show that just focuses on TA but most people are inherently frauds on social media

62432360
>>62432055
I don’t think Solana is a good buy right now it’s barely holding support and likely going lower to like 40 if I remember correctly

>>62432088
If you have a group like that be a hero to the community and share it to us

62432373
>>62432360
>be a hero to the community and share it to us
see
>>62385756
I recently held an airdrop for /biz/ too

https://warosu.org/biz/thread/62424715

62434369
Bump, I'm getting an early weekend because of the country's birthday. Will devote time to this thread.

62435112
>>62432350
skill issue. donalt? lol
you gotta follow the small accounts anon

62436077
>>62435112
Why would you rely on random accounts calls and not build the skill yourself? You are just fucked if you only listen to others, and you have no way to know they aren’t just lucky for a while until they drag you down with themselves

>donalt
Yes he may be old and washed but you can still learn a lot from two traders that never shilled some memecoin. Except for ftx but I guess everyone had an ftx sponsorship for a while

62436265
>UNDER $10K NET WORTH THREAD
>200 REPLIES

LMAOOOOOOOOOOOOOO OH NO NO NO NO AAAAAAAHHHHHH

62437580
>>62436077
did you read my first post? i literally said not to just blindly copy trade
there's nothing wrong with using great traders as confluence

item.title: Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0? — 30 replies — 13.0/hr
item.content:encoded:
Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0?

Open thread • Replies: 30 • Updated: 2026-07-02 15:54 UTC

OP

Have you capitulated on Chainlink yet or are you holding to 0? If it's not obvious by now, LINK isn't used or needed for anything, and doesn't give you any sort of stake in the Chainlink company. It's effectively a meme coin with an illusion of "fundamentals".

Early replies (first 3)

62433176
>>62433164
Yes I’m the last stink marine on /biz/ that’s held out and I finally capitulated. You can tell big serg he can let it rip now.

62433183
>>62433164
Don't care not selling

62433185
>>62433164
Just sold everything. Good job anon, this was the post that finally did it. Congratulations.

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62433307
>>62433164
Arsh goyal saaar pls, you can shit out 4000 of your erc20 scamtoken daily, nobody is buying your 65% team funding bags!

62433436
>>62433164
we are the cuckold marines
and we're NEVER selling

62433437
>>62433436
TRVE!!

62433455
>>62433185
Kek

62433461
>>62433307
A linkie acting like someone calling it out is a thirdworld scammer is an unfathomable level of projection.

62433700
>>62433164
I actually told myself at the start of 2025 that I would sell at the end of 2026 if it hadn't mooned yet.
So you have 6 months, peelers.

62433709
>>62433164
i sold

62435604
Adem won. Total gooner victory

62436081
>>62435604
DO NOT UNDERESTIMATE THE POWER OF ABSOLUTE GOONING

62437170
holding to $0, probably next peak will be $12 before total obliteration

CLL will survive and thrive, but token baggies are now obsolete

62438011
>>62433164
I was one of the never sellers but when they dropped build and allowed no comment on it or staking or payment abstraction failure and we hit $7 most recently I sold. I thought there was a structure being built out in the shadows but it really just seems like they actually are jewing link holders. I had a nightmare it crashed to $2 and sold the next morning because I would never be able to forgive myself if that happened and it honestly seems like it will. I can't believe I sold after putting thousands of hours into this and I really don't know what to look forward to anymore. My average was $21 and selling where I did after that much time and consideration and still losing so bad and surrendering the certainty of making it in such a big way was not joking one of the most painful things I've ever experienced, but things are what they are and I am not going to change them by losing more of my fucking money. It's weird to say but I perversely almost wish I held just so I could look forward to it a little bit longer. I have no big deliverance or catalyst on the horizon to look forward to now and that is a thousand times worse than the money I lost, which is itself substantial.

62438014
>>62438011
Copied word for word with zero edit a friend sent to another friend they'd tried to shill it to who I made sure didn't buy it. I tried to get the writer to sell too but he would not hear it and actually stopped hanging out with me because of it.^ Lol

62438027
>>62438011
Rough. I sold 4k stinks and realized 20k loss, but I’m wanting to DCA again. Guess I’m a masochist. Got 1k suicide stack left rn

62438189
>>62438027
Sorry for your loss man. I would consider taking a different route this time around if prices across all asset classes crash the way they seem like they will. You're getting a new chance to not make the same mistake.

62438207
>>62433164
Forget it—Sir Gay's fans are morons who can't even be called investors; but constantly talking about it doesn't help the forum move on, either.

62438211
Yeah but im just not gonna sell

62438239
>>62438011
kwab
nice AI fanfiction tho

>>62438211
ditto

62438361
>>62438239
What even vaguely makes you think this is AI outside the fact that it goes against your cult groupthink? I don't expect it to change your thinking itself, but I promise it is not AI. Lmao You need to realize that the world is not narrativized by your own headcanon and you are not situated to editorialize the parts of it that don't fit your headcanon from existing just because they make you feel bad and make you want to instantly repress knowing them rather than form a worldview which comports with what is true and reconciles with them. How do you not see that you are literally in a cult?

62438406
>>62438361
>t. verbose AI abusing xrp shill who sticks out like a sore thumb because he's a total retard

62438481
>>62438406
Lol What? I never used AI whatsoever nor did I try to claim to not be me. Nothing I wrote is even verbose and I am not the person who wrote it, it is a literal text from a friend I tried to help get out who ate hard losses. You have gotten SO weird.

62438540
>>62438011
>>62438481
Look, for us non-autistic people it's painfully obvious you are A) verbose XRP shill, making the message from your "friend" already highly suspicious, B) obviously writing out a fanfic that neatly aligns with the shit you have been obsessively spewing in LINK threads for over a year now. Most of it is projection anyway, since XRP and LINK are both down 70% since last summer. If you sold your XRP right now, you would realize just as big a loss as your "friend".

It's honestly kind of endearing how you think you are slick enough to pull this of lmao. You're such a sperg man, holy shit.

62438542
>>62438481
>I was one of the never sellers and then I sold and joined the ranks of the never stop talking about how i sold

Everyone here believes you. Especially me.

62438723
>>62438361
>cult cult cult cult
stop abusing chatGPT free tier you gish gallop spastic, nobody reads your shit lmao

62438807
>>62438723
t. cultist

62439347
>>62433164
It's nothing or the world for me fren

62439402
I am holding until 2035. No matter what the price is I'm selling everything December 31st 2035

item.title: Micron and DRAM — 56 replies — 12.5/hr
item.content:encoded:
Micron and DRAM

Open thread • Replies: 56 • Updated: 2026-07-02 13:44 UTC

OP

While obviously no one can predict the future perfectly, it seems foolish to not invest in something related to AI RAM / HBM Production for the next few years as contracts are already made and supply is bottlenecking
Given what I say is true, which would you guys say is a better choice to start pumping my paychecks into (I already have $60,000 in a market ETF and want more upside)
For some reason my gut is siding towards DRAM, still heavily concentrated but at least has some diversification
It seems like those top 3 companies in it are just making more and more supply deals
Additionally, every piece of evidence I read suggests memory will bottleneck for another year or two
Is it smart to just start DCA into DRAM and then sell once I’ve had my fill (not expecting a perfect pull out timing!)
Again I just wanna do this rather than simply doing stuff into VOO or VGT or something
How much of this is hype and how much of this is brain dead free money that will beat the market
Please be serious and honest

Early replies (first 3)

62427339
>>62427323
you will be eaten mark my words. most of these companies have massive software bloat on their ai's and you wont even get a good exit when all these contracts get put on hold indef while they operate on half of what they are already using and beating metrics by 2 or 3x. the tendency of programming efficency will take your ass out. there will be no warning and demand will cease.

62427365
>>62427339
Is the demand not coming from a need though? At first it was GPUs but now everything doesn’t have enough memory to communicate at the necessary level

62427441
>>62427323
that's a 4 at best

Latest replies (last 30, oldest → newest)

62432266
.

62432668
>>62427323
Semiconductor funds have been crazy profitable and seem to only be increasing. The real money is in selling dumbass AI companies the hardware for their ultimately doomed datacenter investments.

62432824
>>62432668
Do you think Semis > Memory?

62432833
Semis will crash hard once China catches up. Not interesting in that ticking time bomb

62432934
>>62432833
Is memory a safe bet then
DRAM

62433058
>>62430446
>go long on the sector that is still dumping
>don't invest in picks and shovels sector that has no end in sight and has insane earnings reports one after another
I wouldn't listen to this guy.

62433271
>>62427323
Obviously, smart people invested in this in 2024, or last year at the latest. Now is the time to sell, obviously. How is that not obvious to you? Are you a shill? Are there SHILLS and BAGHOLDERS on 4chan?

62433313
>>62432824
>>62432934
Look at these questions made of pure retail last leg.

62433362
>>62427323
rumor of new architecture causing fear for the memory final solution
careful with your longs anons

62433597
>>62433313
What makes you say this

62433722
>>62427339
>you will be eaten mark my words. most of these companies have massive software bloat on their ai's
??????????? The hell are you talking about ABSOLUTE retard? DRAM companies are about manufacturing RAM sticks.

62433745
you fucking cunts /smg/ has been telling you to buy Micron for MONTHS now and you morons are still holding on to your crypto bullshit

62433773
>>62427323
>How much of this is hype and how much of this is brain dead free money that will beat the market
30/70 imo. When you understand the tech underlying this and its actual implementations in every industry, you start to understand that it's genuinely not a bubble, it's the biggest productivity increase since computing but is happening at a much faster rate than computer adoption. If anything the markets are currently UNDERvaluing these stocks because retail investors (and smaller institutions) can't understand the tech.

Memory companies are a decent mid-term hold but after a couple years we will see a simultaneous drop in demand and increase in supply and their margins will collapse back to normal levels - I plan to divest in 12-18 months.

Long term I foresee Anthropic and especially OpenAI being the big winners. Like, 90s Apple levels of winning. These two have an iron grip on flagship LLM tech and frankly can charge whatever the fuck they want for enterprise-level applications and flagship API access. Google and X are the closest to matching them but both are 1-2 years behind if we're being generous. Chinks (and non-Americans in general) are so far behind it's comical. Certain big tech companies (notably Microsoft, Amazon, and Meta, not necessarily in that order) are also poised to win big thanks to their adoption and utilization strategies; Microsoft had a big league but has kind of dropped the ball, but I don't think any of those 3 are going to be the big success that OpenAI/Anthropic will be.

TSMC and NVDA are both excellent long term holds, NVDA arguably moreso (and I say this while being someone who thinks the chances of a CCP invasion, ever, are ~0) but both are great, if a bit overbought in the short term. When I divest from MU etc, TSMC and NVDA are where the cash is most likely to end up.

62433786
Unironically
If someone wanted more safety is SOXX a better bet? I know it’s Semi Conductor focused and not RAM
It is still up triple digits percentage wise over the last year and has a longer track record of 25 years
Is it a smart investment for an overall AI Satellite account versus something thematic like DRAM? Also considering BAKA but don’t know much about it
This is for someone investing over time, short or medium term is fine, I just mean not a giant lump sum

62433799
>>62433773
Okay your claim about betting on Memory through 2027 (12-18 months) feels in line with everything I’ve read
What do you plan on doing to get exposure to memory just something like DRAM or a different option
I’m fine with most of my long term holds just being broad ETFs instead of only betting on tech, but meanwhile short to medium I’m unsure if I take more risk

62433801
>>62433786
I'm not really sure since not all semiconductor companies are created equal. A lot of them are specialized in ways that aren't conducive to AI and while they're completely fine as long-term stable investments, that's not why you or anyone else is investing in SOXX. Personally I'd pick and choose.

62433818
>>62433799
I'm pretty basic and generally more risk averse than other tech bulls so I just sank a bunch of money into MU, WDC, STX, and SNDK, no leverage. If MU hits 1600 I might sell since that's being cited as a potential ceiling by a large number of analysts and frankly the sentiment is more important than any technical validity in this time frame imo. Also fwiw VGT is the second largest position in my Roth IRA but I view that as a 10+ year hold.

62433837
>>62433818
I just have a giant share of VOO from DCA my paychecks into it without thinking but kinda felt like that was wasting a big opportunity now
Hard to say it without is sounding like FOMO cause it’s not
Just looking for a smart hold that should beat the market average that I can sell and then just circle it all back into VOO and chill, I’m nearing 6 figures in it as is which is my goal for this year

62434663
.

62434778
DRAM Down 10% today
Is this a buy?
Trading at $67 currently

62434788
it's over, memory is gay and bankrupt

62434794
>>62434788
You say as Micron just signed another deal this time with GM

62434941
>>62430659
Same.

62435104
>>62433362
i tried to warn you...

62435154
>>62434778
I am also curious
Is this a buy or maybe wait for 20% down

62435463
>>62435154
Eh whatever just bought more voo

62435926
Yeah fuck this shit i gave it some thought and realized it makes no fucking sense unless you have a ton of principal

62438757
>>62427774
I use Claude on a 1 million loc project and it does fine. It doesn't need the entire apps codebase loaded into one context window. If your app is properly designed with SoC principles it can generally figure out stuff. The worst pattern I see from it reliably is it will miss the existence of function that already solves a particular problem and it will reimplement it. It's not perfect, it makes mistakes but it's more than offset by the productivity increase.

62438771
>>62438757
Sir how can I make money with Claude
Sir I need a side hustle sir
